items.title: let, const and binding: reject the invalid model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this JavaScript: Language and Browser Applications misconception? const makes every nested property of an object immutable.
hints: Compare both options with platform semantics and observable user or browser evidence.

feedback.correct: Correct. const prevents rebinding; use freezing or immutable updates when object mutation must also be prevented.
feedback.incorrect: That preserves the misconception. const prevents rebinding; use freezing or immutable updates when object mutation must also be prevented.
